info.title: Bitbybit CAD Cloud API
info.description:
High-performance parametric CAD model generation, STEP conversion, and CAD operation execution via a Bitbybit cloud API.

All async endpoints return **HTTP 202** with a task ID. Poll the task until completion, then retrieve the result download URL.

**Base URL:** `https://api.bitbybit.dev`

**Authentication:** Pass your API key via the `x-api-key` header. Keys are scoped - each endpoint documents which scope is required.

**TypeScript SDK:** Install `@bitbybit-dev/cad-cloud-sdk` for a type-safe Node.js client with built-in polling.

tags.name: Models
tags.description: Parametric CAD model generation. Requires the `models` scope.

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Async task management — status, results, cancellation, retry. Requires the `tasks` scope.

tags.name: CAD
tags.description: Direct CAD operations — execute, pipeline, compound. Requires the `cad` scope.

tags.name: Convert
tags.description: STEP → glTF file conversion. Requires the `convert` scope.

tags.name: Files
tags.description: File upload, confirmation, and management. Requires the `files` scope.

200.description: List of registered parametric model names
Parameter definitions with types, descriptions, and defaults

post.description:
Submits a parametric model for generation. Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID.

Poll `GET /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}` until `status` is `completed`, then fetch the result via `GET /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}/result/{format}`.

See the model-specific examples below. All model parameters are optional — defaults produce a valid model.

post.summary: Generate a batch of parametric models
post.description:
Submits up to 50 variations of a parametric model for parallel generation. Returns **202 Accepted** with a compound task ID and sub-task details.

All items share the same `outputs` configuration. Each item can override `params` independently.

Poll `GET /api/v1/tasks/{taskId}` until the compound task reaches a terminal status, then retrieve individual sub-task results via `GET /api/v1/tasks/{subTaskId}/result/{format}`.

post.summary: Retry a failed or cancelled task

get.summary: Get task result in a specific format

200.description: Pre-signed download URL for the requested format

post.description: Runs one OCCT operation by its dotted path (e.g. `occt.shapes.solid.createSphere`). Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID.

Runs multiple operations sequentially in a single worker. Use `$ref:N` in params to reference step N's result. Optionally pass `outputs` to convert the final OCCT shape result into downloadable formats (STEP, GLB, decomposed mesh).
Upload a STEP file first via the Files API, then convert it to glTF. Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID.
Full-control STEP → glTF conversion with mesh, export, and coordinate options. Returns **202 Accepted** with a task ID.
Returns a pre-signed URL. PUT your file bytes to that URL, then call `POST /api/v1/files/{fileId}/confirm`.
Call after PUTting file bytes to the pre-signed upload URL.

adjustYtoZ.description: Swap Y↔Z axis for mesh/glTF output

items.description: Array of parameter variations. Each item generates a separate sub-task.

outputs.description: Shared output configuration applied to every item

downloadFormats.description: Available result formats for download (populated once completed)

operation.description: Dotted path to an OCCT operation

params.description: Use `$ref:N` to reference step N's result

outputs.description: Optional. When provided, the final pipeline result (if it is an OCCT shape) is converted to the requested formats and the task produces downloadable result parts (step, glb, decomposed-mesh, etc.). When omitted, the raw pipeline result is returned as JSON.

DragonCupParams.description: Dragon Cup parameters — all optional, sane defaults apply

radiusTopOffset.description: How much the top radius differs from bottom

nrSkinCellDivisionsTop.description: Subdivisions at top of each cell

nrSkinCellDivisionsBottom.description: Subdivisions at bottom of each cell

PhoneNestParams.description: Phone Nest parameters — all optional, sane defaults apply

applyOrnaments.description: Add decorative perforations to the surface
